title: Cirrus: Rotate keys post repo. rename

comments.body: `*sigh*` I screwed this all up...got to start over again :cry:

Would you mind adding this link to your commit message, for the next time this needs to happen?

https://cirrus-ci.org/guide/writing-tasks/#encrypted-variables

[edit: I'm assuming that that's the correct doc link. Please change as necessary]

> Would you mind adding this link to your commit message

Oh sure, good idea.  Though I pray nobody has to do it again, it's a PITA.  Especially when the you need to re-do it all again because you went to *containers/libpod repository settings* like a mindless drone :sob:
@mheon @baude okay, this is ready to go pass or fail.  I'll check the other keys after it starts running on the branch.
@cevich Can we get this in the v2.0 branch as well?
Or, can I just cherry-pick it in myself?
Per cevich_smoulderi on IRC this morning:  I need to fix it on every branch :S
